CustomField.description: What to replace matched content with. In Regex mode, use $1, $2 etc. to refer to capture groups from the Pattern. In other modes, $ and \\ are treated as ordinary characters. Blank replacement removes the match entirely; Regex mode requires an explicit replacement.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The replacement string. $1, $2 work in Regex mode only. Leave blank in JSON by Key or Exact Match modes to remove the match entirely.
CustomField.label: Replacement
